author: jimmychu0807
content:
I don't know a good place to post this and discuss, so I'm throwing it here:
https://decrypt.co/363521/solana-foundation-help-secure-defi-protocols-285-million-drift-hack
I read this news that after drift protocol $250+M hack, Solana is setting up STRIDE program to help defi protocols built on top for 24/7 threat monitoring, and further on funding defi protocols seeking for formal verification services.

I think it is a great services for all defi protocols on Solana. Is there something EF could do in this space, assisting defi protocols deployed on Ethereum to be more secure?
